---
id: shorten-url
title: "Shorten a URL using Ottu's core URL shortening service."
description: "This endpoint allows authenticated clients with valid URL shortener credentials to generate a shortened version of a provided long URL. URL shortening must be enabled in your Ottu Core instance configuration. Ensure the request includes a valid private API key in the headers to authenticate the request."
sidebar_label: "Shorten a URL using Ottu's core URL shortening service."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Shorten a URL using Ottu's core URL shortening service."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/utilities/shorten-url/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint allows authenticated clients with valid URL shortener credentials to generate a shortened version of a provided long URL. URL shortening must be enabled in your Ottu Core instance configuration. Ensure the request includes a valid private API key in the headers to authenticate the request.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={null}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./shorten-url.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./shorten-url.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
